heroHeadline: Iran IRGC Fires on Tanker as Ceasefire Expires Apr 21
heroSubtitle: After Iran briefly declared the Strait open Apr 17 (oil -11%), Ghalibaf reversed hours later — IRGC gunboats fired on Indian tanker Apr 18. Trump says 'very good conversations' as blockade holds; S&P 500 hit record 7,022 on Apr 15 despite the war.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
